A sequence of polynomials is given by $p_{n}(x)=a_{n+2}x^{2}+a_{n+1}x-a_{n}$,
for $n\ge0$, where $a_{0}=a_{1}=1$ and, for $n\ge0$, $a_{n+2}=a_{n+1}+a_{n}$.
Denote by $r_{n}$ and $s_{n}$ the roots of $p_{n}(x)=0,$ with $r_{n}\le s_{n}$.
Find $\displaystyle{\lim_{n \to \infty} r_n}$ and $\displaystyle{\lim_{n \to \infty} s_n}$.
